overall.description: First-person exploration of a dark, abandoned hospital or medical facility in a horror video game. The player navigates through debris-filled corridors, past reception desks, and medical equipment under flickering fluorescent and red emergency lighting.

events.description: approaching illuminated reception desk from dark corridor

agents.ego_description: cautiously walking through dark corridor toward a lit reception area

entered.detail: red illuminated exit sign hanging from ceiling
curved wooden reception desk with computer monitors
fluorescent light panels illuminating the reception area
black office chair behind the reception desk

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a dark corridor with only a red exit sign visible in the distance. The player approaches a lit reception desk, revealing a curved wooden counter, office chairs, and fluorescent ceiling lights in an otherwise abandoned facility.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark hallway with emergency exit lighting

events.description: screen fades to black indicating a transition or respawn event
red exit sign becomes the primary light source in the dark hallway

agents.ego_description: moving through a dark hallway toward a red exit sign, temporarily losing vision during a blackout

entered.detail: scattered trash and rubble covering the floor

segments.scene_description: The player moves past the reception into a darker hallway where the screen briefly fades to black. Upon returning, the player continues toward a glowing red exit sign, with debris visible on the floor in the dim light.

scene_state.functional_zone: main hospital corridor with medical equipment

events.description: turning around to return toward the lit reception area
entering wider main corridor with scattered medical equipment

agents.ego_description: turning back toward the lit reception area then proceeding into a wider corridor with medical debris

entered.detail: curved wooden reception desk visible again when turning back
empty wheelchair parked near the reception desk
blue privacy curtains on rolling stands
gurney with white sheets in the corridor

segments.scene_description: The player turns back toward the reception desk, re-entering the lit area, then proceeds into a wider main hospital corridor where wheelchairs, medical curtains, and hospital beds become visible among the debris.

scene_state.functional_zone: debris-filled corridor with graffiti and side rooms

events.description: graffiti-covered walls become prominent in the corridor
approaching and looking into a side room with medical curtains

agents.ego_description: navigating through cluttered corridors and peering into abandoned side rooms

entered.detail: walls covered in spray paint and markings
row of metal and vinyl chairs against the wall
open double doors leading to examination room
small examination room with medical equipment visible inside

segments.scene_description: The player explores deeper into the facility, passing walls covered in graffiti and abandoned waiting chairs. The corridor is littered with debris as the player approaches doorways leading to side examination rooms with medical curtains.

scene_state.functional_zone: corridor with red emergency lighting and multiple doorways

events.description: red emergency lights become the dominant illumination source
passing through a section with extensive wall graffiti and open doorways

agents.ego_description: continuing through dimly lit corridors with red emergency lighting, passing multiple doorways

entered.detail: red illuminated signs and emergency lighting casting crimson glow
multiple open doorways leading to dark rooms

segments.scene_description: The final segment features corridors bathed in red emergency lighting with extensive graffiti covering the walls. The player passes multiple open doorways and abandoned hospital beds while navigating the debris-strewn hallway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a decaying medical facility that shifts from a dim reception area into a sprawling, red-lit corridor of ruins. It begins in a dark hallway guided by a distant red exit sign, moving toward a lit reception desk with a curved wooden counter and flickering fluorescent lights. As the camera passes into a darker corridor and briefly fades to black, it emerges to navigate through debris toward another glowing exit sign before turning back to enter a wider main hospital wing. The scene then expands into a larger ward filled with abandoned wheelchairs, hospital beds, and medical curtains, passing walls marked by graffiti and rows of waiting chairs. Finally, the environment transforms into a series of corridors bathed in oppressive red emergency lighting, where the camera glides past open examination rooms and further debris-strewn hallways.
